underground.source: Calibrated: excess-only dwell beyond GTFS scheduled segment times
underground.notes: MBTA Green Line GTFS records arrival_time == departure_time, so fitted segment travel times already include scheduled dwell (~30s). This value represents only the EXCESS dwell deviation beyond schedule: door-open/close mechanical time (~5s), plus variance for signal holds and door faults. Per-passenger boarding time adds on top via BOARD_TIME_PER_PAX.

surface.source: Calibrated: excess-only dwell beyond GTFS scheduled segment times
surface.notes: Surface stops (B, C, E branches) have higher excess variance than underground: unsignalized cross-traffic, variable door alignment, and pedestrian conflicts add unpredictable extra time beyond schedule. Higher sigma reflects this fat tail.

peak_multiplier.notes: Multiply base dwell by this factor during peak hours to reflect crowding-induced excess door holds.
